items.title: The algorithm has a nose now, and perfume is better for it
items.summary: In a former shop on Ginnekenstraat, a pedestrian street in the Dutch city of Breda, you can answer a short questionnaire about yourself and walk out less than an hour later holding a perfume that did not exist when you arrived. The questions are not the ones …
items.titleZh: 该算法现在有了嗅觉，香水也因此更好
items.summaryZh: 在荷兰布雷达市步行街Ginnekenstraat的一家旧商店里，你可以回答一份关于你自己的简短问卷，不到一个小时后，拿着一瓶你到达时不存在的香水走出去。这些问题不是…

items.title: Bitcoin's recent drop below $60,000 signals Fed, ETF and AI pressures: Deutsche Bank
items.summary: Bitcoin's slump to its lowest level since late 2024 reflects a hawkish Federal Reserve, exchange-traded fund outflows and a shift of capital into AI, the bank said.
items.titleZh: 比特币最近跌破6万美元，表明美联储、ETF和人工智能面临压力：德意志银行
items.summaryZh: 该行表示，比特币暴跌至2024年底以来的最低水平，反映了美联储的鹰派立场、交易所交易基金的外流以及资本向人工智能的转移。

items.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
items.summary: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.
items.titleZh: 标普表示，6月份工厂裁员接近金融危机和新冠肺炎水平
items.summaryZh: 尽管该公司6月份的制造业指数好于预期，但这主要来自库存重建和大幅裁员。

items.title: NHTSA opens new Tesla crash probe after Model 3 slams into home and kills resident
items.summary: According to the Harris County Sheriff's Office, the driver told deputies he was using an automated driving assistance system at the time of the crash. Inside the home was Martha Avila, who later died from injuries sustained in the collision.Read Entire Artic…
items.titleZh: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）在Model 3撞死居民后启动了新的特斯拉碰撞调查
items.summaryZh: 据哈里斯县警长办公室称，司机告诉警察，他在撞车时正在使用自动驾驶辅助系统。家中有玛莎·阿维拉，她后来因碰撞中受伤而死亡。阅读整篇文章…

items.title: Luminvera bets on immersive software for robotics
items.summary: For most of Luminvera’s short life, the pitch came with an AR wearable. The company, incorporated in March 2026 and run out of Silicon Valley, started as a bet that the right device could pull an industrial engineer out of what its founder, Lu Yang, likes to …
items.titleZh: Lumivera押注于机器人沉浸式软件
items.summaryZh: 在Lumivera短暂的生命中，大部分时间都是用AR可穿戴设备来宣传的。该公司成立于2026年3月，在硅谷倒闭，最初的赌注是，合适的设备可以让一名工业工程师摆脱其创始人陆阳喜欢的工作…

items.title: A Tesla on autopilot just killed a woman who was standing in her own living room
items.summary: The Model 3 crash near Houston arrives as Musk stakes the company's future on the same system across a national robotaxi rollout.
items.titleZh: 一辆自动驾驶的特斯拉刚刚杀死了一名站在自己客厅里的妇女
items.summaryZh: 休斯顿附近的Model 3事故发生之际，马斯克正将公司的未来押注于全国机器人出租车推广的同一系统。

items.title: Tesla, NatPower strike $5B deal for 25 GWh of Megapack storage
items.summary:
Tesla and independent energy firm NatPower have reached a deal to build 25 gigawatt-hours of battery storage in Italy and Britain, the first phase of a program worth up to $5 billion.
Under the multiyear agreement, NatPower will deploy Tesla’s Megapack system…
items.titleZh: 特斯拉与NatPower达成价值50亿美元的25 GWh Megapack储能协议
items.summaryZh: 特斯拉和独立能源公司NatPower已达成协议，将在意大利和英国建造25吉瓦时的电池储能系统，这是价值高达50亿美元的项目的第一阶段。

items.title: SpaceX lands $6.3bn compute deal with Reflection AI
items.summary: Reflection AI will pay SpaceX $150mn a month for Nvidia chips at Colossus 2, a deal worth roughly $6.3bn by 2029. The SpaceX Reflection AI deal puts Nvidia on both sides of the trade. SpaceX has signed another giant compute tenant. This time it is Reflection …
items.titleZh: SpaceX与Reflection AI达成63亿美元的计算协议
items.summaryZh: Reflection AI将每月向SpaceX支付1.5亿美元，购买Colossus 2的Nvidia芯片，到2029年，这笔交易的价值约为63亿美元。SpaceX Reflection AI交易使Nvidia成为交易的双方。SpaceX已经签署了另一个巨大的计算租户。这次是反思…

items.title: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
items.summary: Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs is building a video-first hiring platform that combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles, creating something that feels like a cross between LinkedIn and TikTok.
items.titleZh: Fika Jobs筹集了400万美元，建立了一个视频优先的招聘平台，人工智能代理可以在这个平台上面试候选人
items.summaryZh: 总部位于斯德哥尔摩的初创公司Fika Jobs正在构建一个视频优先的招聘平台，该平台将人工智能面试代理与简短的视频资料相结合，创造出一种介于LinkedIn和TikTok之间的东西。
